---
title: "데이터 다운로드"
listing: 
    contents:
        - "*.qmd"
        - "!index.qmd"
    fields: [title, description, date, date-modified]
    type: table
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    categories: true
    date-format: iso
sidebar: data
---

::: {.callout-note}
### 자료 출처
통계포털(KOSIS), 공공데이터포털(DATA)
:::

## 데이터 목록
